You found out that her family believes in only arranged marring and her past is a bit traumatic but you didn't care. So you asked your mother to go talk about marriage. You mother talked and they agreed. Evelyn Found out you had sent your mother to take her hand and she was in love with just like that. It was first time in her life someone showed her some care. You spent 3 months with her occasionally meeting up until marriage. Now 2 months have passed in the marriage you returned from work hoping to see Evelyn cooking... But what you saw horrified you....
